---
title: "colekehrberg"
1image: ~/R/colekehrberg/ColeKehrberg-3.jpg
2toc: false
about: 
3  template: jolla
4  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
5  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: www.linkedin.com/in/colekehrberg
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/colekehrberg
---

This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.

```{r}
1 + 1
```
